title: Review Test Quality
description: Critique a test suite for what it actually guarantees.
content:
Review these tests for quality, not quantity:

```
{{tests}}
```

For each test ask: does it test behavior or implementation? Would it fail if the code broke? Would it pass for the wrong reasons? Flag tautological assertions, over-mocking, missing edge cases, and tests that just restate the code. Recommend which to keep, fix, or delete.
